title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Saylor turns up heat with ‘110 reasons’ why BIP-110 is a bad idea
summary: Saylor turns up heat with ‘110 reasons’ why BIP-110 is a bad idea
briefing: The man in control of the biggest Bitcoin corporate treasury said he shares the objectives but disagrees about the remedy detailed in the proposed temporary fork.

title: US agencies miss GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules
summary: US agencies miss GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules
briefing: US regulators failed to finalize implementing regulations by the GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline, issuing 10 proposed rules instead.

title: Upbit parent Dunamu faces South Korean regulator sanctions process: Report
summary: Upbit parent Dunamu faces South Korean regulator sanctions process: Report
briefing: Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act lacks explicit sanctions provisions for hacking and similar incidents, clouding the scope of penalties facing the Upbit operator Dunamu.

title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
summary: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
briefing: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
summary: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
briefing: Autorité nationale des jeux has ordered France’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
summary: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
briefing: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
summary: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
briefing: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

briefing: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol or Anthropic's Claude Fable 5: Which one is right for you? The answer depends on your needs. Here's our review.

summary: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
briefing: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

summary: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development

summary: Galaxy Puts Its Name on Texas Tech's Stadium in a 15-Year, Crypto-Native Deal
briefing: The Nasdaq-listed digital-asset firm will rebrand the Red Raiders' home as "Galaxy Stadium." The bigger bet is on the cheap power and open land of West Texas.

summary: Three Men Jailed for Posing as Police in $5.3M UK Crypto Fraud
briefing: The gang built fake police websites to fool victims, then spent the stolen crypto on Rolexes and luxury holidays, the Met said.
